sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57571" key="kisshri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κισσηρίζω</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κίσσηρις</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κισσηροειδής</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κισσηρόω</orth>, incorrect forms for <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κισηρ</itype>-.</entryFree>
